name: M-204 Telemetry
func:
var vib = Math.floor(Math.random() * 101); // 0-100
var temp = 60 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 61); // 60-120
var pressure = 20 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 31); // 20-50
var hours = 2000 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 601); // 2000-2600
var days = Math.floor(Math.random() * 30); // 0-29
var wear = ['low','medium','high'][Math.floor(Math.random() * 3)];
var fail = Math.random(); // 0-1

msg.payload = {
    vibration_percentile: vib,
    temperature: temp,
    pressure: pressure,
    operating_hours: hours,
    last_maintenance_days_ago: days,
    bearing_wear: wear,
    failure_probability: fail
};
return msg;

name: M-207 Telemetry
func:
var vib = Math.floor(Math.random() * 80); // 0-79 to avoid anomaly
var temp = 60 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 61); // 60-120
var pressure = 20 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 31); // 20-50
var hours = 1500 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 401); // 1500-1900
var days = Math.floor(Math.random() * 30); // 0-29
var wear = ['low','medium','high'][Math.floor(Math.random() * 3)];
var fail = Math.random() * 0.3; // lower failure probability

msg.payload = {
    vibration_percentile: vib,
    temperature: temp,
    pressure: pressure,
    operating_hours: hours,
    last_maintenance_days_ago: days,
    bearing_wear: wear,
    failure_probability: fail
};
return msg;
